reviews.review_msg: The best science teacher ever!Extremely helpful to questions. Interesting lecture and clear explanation.He is always ready to help and make students feel in ease when going to his office. The exam will not be hard if you understand the material. Everything is well related! I hope I can take class with him again!
Kept the whole class pretty interesting, although sometimes he doesn't 'dumb-down' his explanations enough. Exams are really hard too I found, but lectures are never boring with all the demos.
